title: Joby Aviation Full Year 2024 Earnings: Misses Expectations
text: Joby Aviation reported disappointing full-year 2024 results that fell short of market expectations. The aerospace company posted a net loss of US$608.0 million, with the loss widened by 19 percent from FY 2023. Loss per share was $0.87, representing a deterioration from the prior year's $0.79 loss per share. Revenue missed analyst estimates by 34 percent while earnings per share fell short by 22 percent. Joby generated minimal revenue of just $136,000 from its Aerospace & Defense segment during the trailing twelve-month period. The company's largest expense category was research and development, which consumed $477.2 million representing 78 percent of total expenses. Looking forward, the company projects revenue growth of 60 percent annually over the next three years. However, investor sentiment has been negative with shares down 9.6 percent from a week ago following the earnings announcement.
